# Context Loader

> System for selecting and loading context modules into a coding agent's workspace.

## Platform Backend
- [platform/src/config.py](platform/src/config.py) — Centralized Pydantic Settings class; all env vars and derived paths; import `settings` from here, never read os.environ directly
- [platform/src/server.py](platform/src/server.py) — FastAPI app factory, constants, SPA fallback, entry point
- [platform/src/models.py](platform/src/models.py) — Pydantic request/response models
- [platform/src/llms.py](platform/src/llms.py) — llms.txt generation and parsing helpers
- [platform/src/routes/modules.py](platform/src/routes/modules.py) — Module CRUD and file CRUD endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/workspace.py](platform/src/routes/workspace.py) — Workspace load, secrets endpoints
- [platform/src/routes/chat.py](platform/src/routes/chat.py) — Stateless chat SSE streaming and `GET /api/sessions` (lists sessions from disk via claude_sessions service)
- [platform/src/routes/health.py](platform/src/routes/health.py) — Health check endpoint
- [platform/src/routes/files.py](platform/src/routes/files.py) — File download endpoint (GET /api/files/download) with path validation against CONTEXT_DIR and /tmp
- [platform/src/routes/commands.py](platform/src/routes/commands.py) — Slash commands listing endpoint (GET /api/commands) from static COMMANDS registry
- [platform/src/commands.py](platform/src/commands.py) — Static slash-command registry (CommandDef + COMMANDS list)
- [platform/src/services/claude_sessions.py](platform/src/services/claude_sessions.py) — Reads Claude Code's on-disk session transcripts (~/.claude/projects/<encoded-cwd>/*.jsonl); pure functions claude_project_dir, first_user_message, list_sessions; no state
- [platform/src/services/git_repo.py](platform/src/services/git_repo.py) — Local git clone wrapper (clone, read/write, sync_status/pull/push)
- [platform/src/routes/sync.py](platform/src/routes/sync.py) — Sync API endpoints (GET /api/sync/status, POST /api/sync/pull, POST /api/sync/push)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/sync.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/sync.ts) — Sync API client (fetchSyncStatus, pullSync, pushSync)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/SyncControls.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/SyncControls.tsx) — Pull/Push buttons driven by sync status
- [platform/src/services/schemas.py](platform/src/services/schemas.py) — Env schema generation, parsing, Infisical augmentation
- [platform/src/services/secrets.py](platform/src/services/secrets.py) — Varlock secret status and loading
- [platform/frontend/](platform/frontend/) — React SPA (Vite + TanStack Router + TanStack Query)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/](platform/frontend/src/api/) — API client layer (fetch wrapper, modules, workspace, chat, sessions, commands)
- [platform/frontend/src/api/commands.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/commands.ts) — Slash commands API client (fetchCommands, Command type)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/SlashCommandSelector.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/SlashCommandSelector.tsx) — Slash command dropdown selector component and useSlashCommands hook
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/MentionSelector.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/MentionSelector.tsx) — @-mention file picker component (MentionSelector), useMentionPicker hook, and findActiveMention utility
- [platform/frontend/src/components/chat/DecisionTreePanel.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/chat/DecisionTreePanel.tsx) — Tree navigation visualization with breadcrumbs and module access counts
- [platform/frontend/src/api/sessions.ts](platform/frontend/src/api/sessions.ts) — Sessions API client (fetchSessions only; SessionInfo type)
- [platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSessionStore.ts](platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSessionStore.ts) — Zustand store holding only `activeClaudeSessionId` (localStorage-persisted); session list comes from the server
- [platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSidebarMode.ts](platform/frontend/src/hooks/useSidebarMode.ts) — Zustand store for sidebar layout mode (classic/accordion/zones/cards) and collapsed state (localStorage-persisted)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/](platform/frontend/src/components/) — React components (Chat, ModuleRegistry, IconRail, ContextPanel, etc.)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/useContextData.ts](platform/frontend/src/components/context/useContextData.ts) — Shared hook extracting all data-fetching, mutations, session handlers, and derived state from ContextPanel (returns ContextData for layout components to consume)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/SidebarHeader.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/context/SidebarHeader.tsx) — Sidebar header with CONTEXT label, 4-icon mode switcher (classic/accordion/zones/cards segmented control), and collapse toggle
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/ClassicLayout.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/context/ClassicLayout.tsx) — Original flat-section sidebar layout (Sessions, Modules, Secrets, Decision Tree)
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/AccordionLayout.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/context/AccordionLayout.tsx) — Accordion layout mode with always-visible module pills, 4 collapsible sections (File Access, Sessions, Modules, Secrets), and auto-close Modules section when loaded data arrives
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/ZonesLayout.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/context/ZonesLayout.tsx) — Two-zone sidebar layout: top status strip with module pills and secret/session summary, bottom tabbed area with Files (DecisionTreePanel), Sessions, and Setup tabs
- [platform/frontend/src/components/context/CardsLayout.tsx](platform/frontend/src/components/context/CardsLayout.tsx) — Card-based layout with module card (inline manage expand), file access card, and compact session card
- [platform/frontend/src/routes/](platform/frontend/src/routes/) — TanStack Router file-based routes
- [platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts](platform/frontend/src/utils/humanizeToolCall.ts) — Utility to translate raw tool call names/args into human-readable labels with module resolution
- [Dockerfile](Dockerfile) — Multi-stage container image (Node build + Python runtime)
## Self-Hosting
- [docker-compose.yml](docker-compose.yml) — Docker Compose for deployment (pulls image) and dev (--build)
- [.env.example](.env.example) — Environment variable template for self-hosted deployment
- [.github/workflows/publish.yml](.github/workflows/publish.yml) — CI workflow to build and push image to GHCR

## Active Plans
- [docs/plans/active/17-agent-backend-abstraction.md](docs/plans/active/17-agent-backend-abstraction.md) — Plan: Agent backend abstraction (Claude Code vs opencode)
- [docs/plans/active/18-REFACTOR_PLAN.md](docs/plans/active/18-REFACTOR_PLAN.md) — Plan: Refactoring roadmap (config, manifest, SQLite, SDK)
- [docs/plans/active/19-module-manifest.md](docs/plans/active/19-module-manifest.md) — Plan: Replace .env.schema + requirements.txt with module.yaml manifest

## Archived Plans
- [docs/plans/archive/](docs/plans/archive/) — Historical plans (filebrowser, CLI, module management, MCP server, commercialization)

## Guides
- [docs/guides/deployment.md](docs/guides/deployment.md) — End-user deployment guide (Docker, env vars, HTTPS, troubleshooting)
- [docs/guides/varlock.md](docs/guides/varlock.md) — Varlock secret management system explained
- [docs/guides/writing-efficient-scripts.md](docs/guides/writing-efficient-scripts.md) — Guidelines for writing network-efficient scripts
- [docs/guides/debugging-claude-timing.md](docs/guides/debugging-claude-timing.md) — Methodology for measuring Claude Code chat timing

## Ideas
- [docs/ideas/info.md](docs/ideas/info.md) — Foundational concept: modular context for AI agents

## Reference
- [STATUS.md](STATUS.md) — What the system is, how it's built, current state (load every conversation)
- [DECISIONS.md](DECISIONS.md) — Architectural decisions and rationale (load when planning or changing things)
